name: @fnioc-examples/without-transformer
description: Runnable @fnioc/config example with no transformer -- explicit tokens, hand-written dependency metadata (forCtor), and a SchemaFor<T>-checked hand-written bind schema, wired into the real, published @fnioc/di DiBuilder API. Depends on @fnioc/config plus all three provider packages (the add* sugar arrives via their side-effect imports).

scripts.start: moon run examples-without-transformer:build && APP_Server__Host=0.0.0.0 node dist/main.js --Server:Port 8080
